title: Neon Genesis RainbowgelionTaste The Rainbow
wikitext:
[]: Neon Genesis Rainbowgelion:Taste The Rainbow             Quote Post by EvaCub » Tue Oct 09, 2007 8:13 pm Well there are 3 rainbows in rebuild religious symbolism anyone? for instance "God promised not to flood the eath again?" ie:possible No 3rd impact? I realized this theory is very strectched but, Lets discuss the shots that have rainbows in rebuild so far are after Shamshel rainbow A.T. Field after Sachiel **and I know...POINTLESS RELGIOUS SYMBOLISM**

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Oct 09, 2007 8:19 pm Well, another variation of the rainbow, from Greek myth, is that it is Iris, a messenger to the Gods. Of course, it's impossible to say exactly what Anno is aiming at with the rainbows. It might be hopelessly pointless relgious symbolism, like those ridiculous cross-blast weapons Sachiel and Zeruel use out of their eyes.

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Tue Oct 09, 2007 8:23 pm Or maybe things just look prettier with 7 more colours.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Tue Oct 09, 2007 8:41 pm I'm still stuck on the OMFGWTF no Third Impact. :oops: I think It'd be neat

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Oct 09, 2007 9:16 pm This may just fit in with other Christian symbolism that means nothing like what it meant in original Christianity.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Tue Oct 09, 2007 11:26 pm It's aesthetic. It probably "means" nothing.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Oct 10, 2007 9:26 am Maybe it's another homo-erotic undertone. :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by JP » Wed Oct 10, 2007 10:39 am Yeah it could be all that....or a lens flare

[]:             Quote Post by fadingreminder » Wed Oct 10, 2007 10:39 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Maybe it's another homo-erotic undertone. :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Wed Oct 10, 2007 11:18 am WOOT! Except for the fem-bit. :(

[]:             Quote Post by Morzella » Wed Oct 10, 2007 1:01 pm I think it is a message that there will infact be be more new evas in the new movies then anyone dared imagine. We already have: Unit 00 - Yellow (Blue) Unit 01 - purple Unit 02 - Red Also Unit 04 was black. However this time round he will survive his run -in with an angel (and Unit 01) and be re-painted like Unit 00. I belive he will be a nice pea green. Then we will have the following added. One each in the last two movies to come. Unit 05 - Orange Unit 06 - A sort of off purple colour (people will call it violet). It is possible that I am wrong about the last one. Instead it may be that the MPE's are a odd purple colour instead.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Oct 10, 2007 1:37 pm Unit 00 - Yellow/Orange Unit00 - Blue Unit01 - Purple Unit02 - Red Unit03 - Black Unit04 - Silver MPEVA - White Now, if we follow traditional sentai colors, I would say that we're overdue for a Green or Pink Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Oct 10, 2007 2:14 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Now, if we follow traditional sentai colors, I would say that we're overdue for a Green or Pink Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Wed Oct 10, 2007 3:28 pm If anyone is getting a pink Evangelion it's Kaworu. Then he could put one of those rainbow bumper stickers on it to complete the look.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed Oct 10, 2007 3:35 pm ^ I fully support that. ^

[]:             Quote Post by Wevangeliwon » Wed Oct 10, 2007 3:36 pm I think it is just something added in for effect. Nothing signifigant . . . but then again, I have underestimated things EVA before. And we need a Green EVA if they are going all out on sentai colours. Although, a Green EVA would look plain weird.

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Wed Oct 10, 2007 6:28 pm We should get Kaworu to replace his plugsuit with a tight-fitting mankini.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Wed Oct 10, 2007 6:30 pm Mr. Tines wrote: I have some bad news for you....

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Wed Oct 10, 2007 9:00 pm Hunter21 wrote: If anyone is getting a pink Evangelion it's Kaworu. Then he could put one of those rainbow bumper stickers on it to complete the look.

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Mon Oct 15, 2007 3:04 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Maybe it's another homo-erotic undertone. :roll:

I realized this theory is very strectched but, Lets discuss the shots that have rainbows in rebuild so far are after Shamshel rainbow A.T. Field after Sachiel **and I know...PO
